---
title: 'Darrell G. Wolfe BIO'
date: '2013-11-14T19:29:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1265372459384887912'
blogger_filename: '/2013/11/darrell-g-wolfe-bio.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><h3 class="post-title entry-title" itemprop="name">BIO: Who Am I? </h3><div class="post-header"> </div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-small-d0eb8699f5d3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-small-30d674041cc8.jpg" width="231" /></a></div></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><h4>&nbsp;Who Am I?</h4><b>My name is Darrell G. Wolfe:</b><br /><ul><li>I am a Servant Son of my Father God, My Lord Jesus, and my Friend Holy Spirit!</li><li>I am a Husband to my Flavia, Father to my Sons, Uncle to my Niece, and Son to my Parents</li><li>I am a Teacher, Coach, Trainer, Leader, Mentor</li><li>I am a&nbsp; Blog Writer, Published Author, Content Writer</li><li>I am an Audio Engineer, Singer, Song Writer, Musician</li><li>I am... Whatever else my Father asks me to be</li></ul><b>Some Random Things About Me:</b><br /><ul><li>I enjoy making Excel Sheets (Just For Fun!)</li><li>My favorite foods are Cheeseburgers and Thai Food!</li><li>I read/study constantly, any topic I can...&nbsp;</li><li>Sci Fi Geek!</li><ul><li>Favorite Series</li><ul><li>Stargate <a href="http://stargate.mgm.com/view/series/1/index.html" target="_blank">SG1 </a>and <a href="http://stargate.mgm.com/view/series/2/index.html" target="_blank">Atlantis </a>(not a big SGU fan)</li><li><a href="http://www.startrek.com/" target="_blank">Star Trek</a> (ALL of them!)</li></ul></ul></ul><h4>What have I done?</h4><ul><li><b>By Hobby</b>: </li><ul><li>Write Several Blogs, as time permits</li><li>Published "<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/1980/01/banking-basics-for-believers.html">Banking Basics for Believers</a>"</li><li>&nbsp;Audio Engineer</li><ul><li>Part Time Audio Sound Board Tech, several churches 1996-Present</li><li>In School Now: "<a href="http://schooloftecharts.com/" target="_blank">School of the Tech Arts</a>" working toward a career change. </li></ul><li>Singer - Musician</li><ul><li>Worship Leader for several small church youth groups</li><li>Song Writer for a short lived Christian Worship Rock Band</li><li>Some training in Classical Voice, Guitar, Theory, Piano, and Percussion</li></ul></ul></ul><ul><li><b>Professionally</b>:</li><ul><li>Restaurant Server for 9 years</li><li>Banking and Personal Finance for 8+ years</li><li>Retail (Target, Costco)</li><li>Tire Center</li><li>Construction</li><li>Pool Maintence</li><li>Western Clothing-Hat Shaper and Cleaner&nbsp;</li><li>Camp Maintenance and Counselor </li><li>Other Things here and there... I've grown some, but things didn't hold my interest long when I was younger. </li></ul></ul><br /><h4>What am I doing?</h4><ul><li><b>Serving God by: </b></li><ul><li>Loving my Wife and Kids </li><li>Working toward a degree in Audio Engineering</li><li>Writing as often as possible</li><li>Studying every topic I possibly can, to keep my mind sharp</li><li>Helping People Succeed in life (both professionally and as a writer)</li></ul></ul><br /><h4>Where am I going?</h4><b>I don't know all of it...</b><br /><br /><b>Here are some ideas for the time being:</b><br /><ul><li>Grow in Grace!</li><li>Love my Family !</li><li>Finish Audio School</li><li>Give More Time to Church </li><li>Write More Consistently</li><li>Publish More Books</li><li>Yada Yada Yada... Become a Billionaire (and give <i><b><u>ridiculously </u></b></i>to God's Kingdom)!!!</li></ul>
